captureMethod: cloakbrowser full-depth (3 pages) + nuances.json (CSS vars, Satoshi, Lenis shell, letter-split, scroll samples, image inventory)
stack: Vite SPA + Satoshi + Lenis-class scroll + letter-split headlines
notes: Every PartImage carries a style-of-image prompt (role + photographic grade). Hero scale approximates captured 1.5→1 scroll. Letter-split is dual-line overflow wipe, not per-glyph GSAP. Full-screen menu uses mega type ~96px. Strip source personal name and client brands.
